data.body: HOLD (coordinator directive 2026-07-09): a standing deliberate decision in docs/scale-envelope.md L40-43 ('intentionally no batched-commit fast path — it would weaken the per-write durability guarantee') directly contests this epic's premise. Pausing before landing pending user decision (override with import-only carve-out, or veto/park). B1 change #459 is already pushed to Gerrit and must be HELD (not submitted). No tickets closed. Epic decomposition + local B1 impl retained.
